title: More Stick Variants (MStV)
description: Sticks for every kind of wood. A base mod for other Variant Mods using Sticks as crafting ingredients.
body:
[![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios)         Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Stick-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ## More Stick Variants Planks already exist in all the wood types, naturally, and we can use those to craft 'More X Variant' items. But what if the crafting recipe only includes Sticks? That's what More Stick Variants has come to solve, all variant mods that mainly need sticks in their recipes will be based upon this mod. | **__Existing 'MStV+' mods__** | **__Upcoming 'MStV+' mods__** | |:------|:-------------| | [More Armor Stand Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-stand-variants/), [More (Fishing) Rod Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-fishing-rod-variants/), [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants), [Nemo's More Ladder Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-more-ladder-variants), [More Tool Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-tool-variants), [More (Item/Painting) Frame Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-frame-variants), [More Weapon Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-weapon-variants), [More Rail Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-rail-variants) | More Redstone Component Variants, ... | | | | Note:| | While not an "MStV+" mod, [Nemo's Campfires](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-campfires) is fully compatible with More Stick Variants and is basically what a _More Campfire Variants_ mod would've looked like if I had made one.
What about other variant mods that include Sticks as ingredients? Variant mods with items whose crafting recipes include Sticks (like More Grindstone Variants, currently the only one) are all compatible with More Stick Variants.
What about vanilla recipes that use Sticks as ingredients? This mod also includes updates to all recipes using sticks so that all Variant Sticks can be used and specifically Fences, Fence Gates and Signs who are by nature already seperated by wood type will now only use their appropriate Stick Variant, see the crafting recipe gifs below: ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/pres/fence_recipe_anim.gif) | ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/pres/fence_gate_recipe_anim.gif) | ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/pres/sign_recipe_anim.gif)
How can I craft vanilla Sticks using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Stick crafting recipe has to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipe, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft sticks and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:contact@pnku.de)!
Additionally, the vanilla Stick item is now considered the _**Oak Stick**_ and the place of a '_Bamboo_ _Stick_' takes the Bamboo item itself. A presentation of all newly added sticks using '[More Frame Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-frame-variants/)'. ### Adding 11 new _Sticks_ to Minecraft. --- ###  [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/pres/pale_oak_stick.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/hunnycakehorse) Pale Oak Stick and most Pale Oak MStV+ textures by [hunnycakehorse](https://modrinth.com/user/hunnycakehorse)
